name: just-another-skill
description: Collection of Claude Code skills for AI image generation, video production, writing, automation, and creative direction

plugins.name: openrouter-images-skill
plugins.description: AI image generation Creative Director powered by Gemini via OpenRouter. Text-to-image, image editing, batch processing, and cost tracking.

plugins.name: visual-prompt-crafter
plugins.description: Craft and improve visual prompts for AI image generators. Creates compelling prompts, enhances existing ones, and analyzes reference images.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Makes content sound natural and human-written.

plugins.name: human-voice
plugins.description: Transform raw thoughts into polished communications. Emails, sales pitches, support replies, and negotiations that sound authentically human.

plugins.name: n8n-node-builder
plugins.description: Build custom n8n community nodes from scratch. Creates production-ready integrations for any API.

plugins.name: ai-director
plugins.description: Master framework for AI image generation, cinematic video direction, and narrative storytelling.

plugins.name: seedance-director
plugins.description: Video prompt director for Seedance 2.0. Converts scene descriptions into production-ready bilingual video prompts.

plugins.name: thumbnail-creator
plugins.description: YouTube thumbnail creative director. Generates high-converting thumbnail prompts with 33+ techniques.

plugins.name: easypanel-template
plugins.description: Generate production-ready Easypanel deployment templates for any self-hosted app.
